positive: A minimalist, geometric depiction of a cosmic wanderer silhouette—a stylized figure standing on a floating, circular platform composed of intersecting celestial rings. The figure is silhouetted against a vibrant gradient nebula backdrop featuring deep indigo, electric cyan, and pops of luminous magenta. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets cosmic vaporwave, utilizing clean, bold linework and highly contrasted colors. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, and perfectly balanced for print. Details: Intricate, glowing ley lines connecting the figure to the planet below; subtle halftone pattern overlay on the background for texture. The design must be visually impactful and scalable as a repeat pattern or central motif, maintaining strong contrast against fabric. Medium: Vector art rendered with maximal detail, high resolution, UHD.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, artifact, low detail, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photographic, realistic, logos, copyright, cropped
